name: 🔒 Security report
about: Report a security or privacy concern (PHI, auth, crypto, secrets, Health Connect)
title: "[security] "

assignees: ["spatchava"]
---

> ⚠️ **Do not include exploit details, real PHI, or production secrets in this issue.**
> For exploitable vulnerabilities, prefer a private channel: email the maintainer
> (see CODEOWNERS) before filing publicly. This template is for low-severity reports
> and hardening suggestions.

## Summary

## Affected surface
- [ ] Android phone app
- [ ] Wear OS app
- [ ] Health Connect permission scope
- [ ] Keystore / EncryptedSharedPreferences / SQLCipher
- [ ] Network / TLS / cert pinning
- [ ] Auth / JWT / FHIR OAuth (PKCE)
- [ ] Audit log

## Severity (your estimate)
- [ ] Critical (PHI exfiltration / auth bypass)
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low / hardening

## Suggested mitigation
